chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.427 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ PRIORITY CASE: 1. For order on office objection a/w reply at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.4419/2022. ----------- Dated; 21st October 2025 Mr. Abdul Wahab Baloch, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate for Respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Mushtaq, Advocate for Respondent No.4. Mr. Muhammad Sarmad Khan, Advocate for Respondent No.7. Mr. Zia-ul-Haq Makhdoom, Advocate for Respondent No.9. -*-*-*-*-*- Learned counsel for appellant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this appeal and submits that trial Court may be directed to expedite the trial, record evidence and decide suit. Learned counsel for respondents submit that trial Court may be directed to decide the suit subject to all exceptions: deciding the application as well challenging maintainability of suit. Appeal is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to decide suit within a period of six months subject to all exceptions, as defined above. JUDGE JUDGE *Farhan/PS*
